docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TOWNSEND, CHRISTINA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRIEDHEIM, ERICA $150.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $180.00, I FIND THAT EACH SIDE BEARS FAULT FOR THIS LOSS AND HAVE MODIFIED THE AMOUNT ACCORDINGLY. I BASE THIS RULING ON THE VALUE OF USED SHOES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
